heading: About Me
roles: Data Professional, Research Assistant, Graduate Engineer, Data Scientist (Capstone)
bio: Data Professional with over two years of experience in data engineering, analytics, and dashboarding for finance and AI/ML projects. Proficient in SQL, Excel, and Tableau; automated ETL pipelines and built interactive dashboards that uncovered $80K+ in cost savings and boosted data processing efficiency by 35%.
Skilled at collaborating with stakeholders to translate analytical insights into actionable recommendations and drive improved customer and business outcomes.
quote: I'm a lifelong learner and innovator, driven by a desire to contribute with new ideas and tools that deliver real value.
